productDisplayName: Playboy Men New York Perfume Buy 1 Get 1 free
description: Style Noteplayboy launches a new fragrance, named New york, thus enlarging the collection of fragrances which includes Ibiza, Hollywood, Malibu, Miami and, Vegas editions.New York is a new fragrance which represents and embodies everyday life of the metropolis with its woody and masculine notes. Top notes of the Playboy New York composition bring aldehydes, lime and vinyl chords. The heart introduces green apple, elemi, black pepper, followed by the base of vetiver, Tonka and vanilla. This sensual mix of wood, fruit and spice notes makes this fragrance a must buy and what's more to double the joy, you buy one perfume and get one absolutely free! Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
